game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Worms™ 4**: Worms 4 is a turn-based artillery strategy game where two teams of worms battle on a destructible 2D landscape, taking turns to move and attack. During a turn, players control a single worm by dragging to move a limited distance across the terrain and tapping to perform a jump, then select a weapon from their arsenal. Weapons are aimed by swiping on the screen to adjust trajectory and power, with a final tap to fire, causing explosions that inflict damage (e.g., 20-50 HP) and deform the environment. Progression involves completing 80 single-player missions or winning synchronous online multiplayer matches, which award coins and experience used to unlock and upgrade over 100 unique weapons and utilities, enhancing their damage, blast radius, or utility duration. Players can customize their worms with cosmetic items purchased with coins, and the game concludes when one team eliminates all opposing worms by reducing their 100 HP to zero.
game_info.description: Battle against enemy worms in turn-based artillery combat on destructible terrain. Command your team of worms, strategically position them, and launch devastating weapons to eliminate all opposing worms. Each worm has 100 HP - reduce enemy health to zero while protecting your team. Master trajectory and power to land precision strikes that reshape the battlefield. Complete missions to unlock new weapons and prove your tactical prowess!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move selected worm left/right during movement phase
Space: Jump (if on ground) during movement phase
Z: Fire selected weapon during attack phase
Shift: Cycle through available weapons
Enter: Start game from menu
Esc: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart and return to menu

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic game mechanics including worm movement, weapon selection, and turn transitions. Validates that the game properly cycles between teams and phases.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move worms randomly, cycle through weapons, and fire at approximate enemy positions. Test both teams' ability to take turns and verify phase transitions work correctly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Game should handle turn transitions smoothly, worms should move and attack without errors, and the game should continue until one team is eliminated or significant damage is dealt.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests optimal gameplay strategy to achieve victory. Implements intelligent targeting to eliminate all enemy worms efficiently.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Position worms strategically near enemies, select the most powerful available weapon (bazooka preferred), calculate optimal trajectory and power to hit enemy worms, and systematically eliminate all opponents.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully eliminate all enemy worms, triggering GAME_OVER_WIN state. Test validates win condition detection and proper game conclusion.
